x-enumeration-literals.name: Monetary Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentive that provides direct financial benefits.

Comment:
Examples:
Cash bonuses for employees meeting targets
Cashback on credit card spending
Fee waivers or discounts
Interest rate benefits on deposits or loans

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-Monetary Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentive that provides value without cash, such as recognition, privileges, or goods.

Comment:
Examples:
Reward points redeemable for merchandise, travel, or services
VIP account privileges or premium services
Certificates, awards, or recognition programs
Access to exclusive events or experiences

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance-Based Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentive linked to specific actions, milestones, or performance metrics.

Comment:
Examples:
Tiered rewards based on spending or transactions
Milestone bonuses for opening multiple accounts
Referral rewards for bringing in new customers

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hybrid Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives that combine two or more types (monetary + non-monetary, or performance-based).

Comment:
Examples:
Cash bonus + reward points for achieving a sales target
Tiered rewards with both cashback and VIP privileges
